name: Slipknot
description: Slipknot is a nine-member American heavy metal band from Des Moines, Iowa, known for their grotesque Halloween-inspired masks, chaotic live performances, and aggressive musical style. Formed in 1995, they rose to mainstream fame with their self-titled debut in 1999 and have since sold over 30 million records worldwide, becoming one of the most commercially successful and influential heavy metal bands of the 21st century.
trivia: Each band member is assigned a number from 0 to 8, a tradition that started with the original nine-member lineup.
The band's name was taken from one of their own early songs, suggested by drummer Joey Jordison during a late-night session at a Sinclair gas station where he worked.
Slipknot self-financed their debut demo 'Mate. Feed. Kill. Repeat.' for approximately $40,000 before signing their record deal.
Their self-titled debut album was the first release on Roadrunner Records to be certified platinum.
The band launched their own music festival, Knotfest, in 2012, which has since expanded to multiple countries worldwide.
Slipknot won their first Grammy Award in 2006 for Best Metal Performance for the single 'Before I Forget'.
Founding bassist Paul Gray's death in 2010 led to the album '.5: The Gray Chapter' being dedicated in his memory.
Their Disasterpieces live DVD has been certified 4x Platinum by the RIAA, making it one of the best-selling music DVDs ever.
